subcodes.first_line: O devoted friends! The world is in confusion, and all existence laboureth under grievous affliction and endless hardship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جان نثاران جهان پریشانست و امکان در نهایت مشقت و زحمت بی پایان مگر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @thankfulness; gratitude
